div1.entryFree: Chough, the bird Corvus monedula: I myself could make a c. of as deep chat, Tp. II, 1, 266. russet-pated --s, Mids. III, 2, 21. --s' language, gabble enough, All's IV, 1, 22. scared my --s from the chaff, Wint. IV, 4, 630. magot-pies and --s and rooks, Mcb. III, 4, 125. 'tis a c. Hml. V, 2, 89.*the crows and --s that wing the midway air, Lr. IV, 6, 13.
